name: Duplicate story detector
description: AI-powered detection of redundant user stories

name: Implement Single Sign-On (SSO) for New Users
description:
As a new user, I want to sign up using my existing social media or email account, so that I can quickly access the platform without creating a new account.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a new user, when they choose to sign up, then they should see options for SSO with Google, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
- Given a new user selects Google for SSO, when they authenticate successfully, then their account should be created and they should be logged in.
- Given a new user selects an SSO option, when authentication fails, then they should receive an error message and the option to try again.
epic: Overhaul user onboarding with SSO, guided tour, and progress tracking

name: Develop Interactive Guided Tour for Onboarding
description:
As a first-time user, I want an interactive tour of the platform, so that I can understand how to use key features effectively.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a first-time user, when they log in for the first time, then the guided tour should start automatically.
- Given a user is on the guided tour, when they complete a step, then the next step should be highlighted.
- Given a user is on the guided tour, when they choose to skip, then the tour should end and they should be taken to the dashboard.
epic: Overhaul user onboarding with SSO, guided tour, and progress tracking

name: Create Progress Tracking System for Onboarding
description:
As a new user, I want to see my onboarding progress, so that I can know how much I have completed and what is left.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a new user, when they complete an onboarding step, then their progress should be updated on the progress bar.
- Given a new user, when they view their dashboard, then they should see a progress bar indicating their onboarding completion status.
- Given a new user, when they complete all onboarding steps, then they should receive a notification congratulating them.
epic: Overhaul user onboarding with SSO, guided tour, and progress tracking

name: Integrate SSO with Existing User Accounts
description:
As a existing user, I want to link my account with SSO options, so that I can log in more conveniently in the future.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given an existing user, when they go to account settings, then they should see options to link their account with Google, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
- Given an existing user selects Google to link their account, when they authenticate successfully, then their account should be linked to Google.
- Given an existing user selects an SSO option, when authentication fails, then they should receive an error message and the option to try again.
epic: Overhaul user onboarding with SSO, guided tour, and progress tracking

name: Synchronize Jira Backlog with Intelligent Prioritization Tool
description:
As a Product Owner, I want synchronize the Jira backlog with the intelligent prioritization tool, so that I can have an up-to-date and prioritized list of backlog items.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a connected Jira account, when I initiate synchronization, then the backlog items are imported into the prioritization tool.
- Given a backlog item in Jira, when it is updated, then the changes are reflected in the prioritization tool after synchronization.
- Given a backlog item in the prioritization tool, when synchronization occurs, then no data is lost or corrupted.
epic:
Epic : Priorisation intelligente connectée à Jira
Objectif : Permettre au Product Owner de synchroniser le backlog Jira, scorer automatiquement les items (RICE, WSJF, IA), puis renvoyer les résultats dans Jira.

name: Automate Item Scoring Using RICE and WSJF Models
description:
As a Product Owner, I want automate the scoring of backlog items using RICE and WSJF models, so that I can prioritize items based on objective criteria.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a backlog item, when the RICE model is applied, then a score is generated based on reach, impact, confidence, and effort.
- Given a backlog item, when the WSJF model is applied, then a score is generated based on job size, value, time criticality, and risk reduction.
- Given a set of backlog items, when scoring is automated, then all items have both RICE and WSJF scores.
epic:
Epic : Priorisation intelligente connectée à Jira
Objectif : Permettre au Product Owner de synchroniser le backlog Jira, scorer automatiquement les items (RICE, WSJF, IA), puis renvoyer les résultats dans Jira.

name: Integrate AI for Enhanced Backlog Item Evaluation
description:
As a Product Owner, I want integrate AI to enhance the evaluation of backlog items, so that I can make more informed prioritization decisions.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a backlog item, when AI evaluation is performed, then insights on potential impact and dependencies are provided.
- Given a set of backlog items, when AI is integrated, then items are ranked based on predicted value and feasibility.
- Given AI recommendations, when reviewed, then they align with historical data and expert judgment.
epic:
Epic : Priorisation intelligente connectée à Jira
Objectif : Permettre au Product Owner de synchroniser le backlog Jira, scorer automatiquement les items (RICE, WSJF, IA), puis renvoyer les résultats dans Jira.

name: Export Prioritization Results Back to Jira
description:
As a Product Owner, I want export the prioritization results back to Jira, so that the team can see the updated priorities directly in Jira.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given prioritized items in the tool, when export is initiated, then the updated priorities are reflected in Jira.
- Given a successful export, when I check Jira, then all items have the correct prioritization tags.
- Given an export failure, when retry is initiated, then the system provides a detailed error message and logs.
epic:
Epic : Priorisation intelligente connectée à Jira
Objectif : Permettre au Product Owner de synchroniser le backlog Jira, scorer automatiquement les items (RICE, WSJF, IA), puis renvoyer les résultats dans Jira.

name: Enable Seamless Backlog Management for Product Owners
description:
As a Product Owner, I want manage the backlog seamlessly between Jira and the prioritization tool, so that I can maintain an efficient workflow without manual updates.

Acceptance criteria:
- Given a backlog item update in Jira, when synchronization occurs, then the prioritization tool reflects the update without manual intervention.
- Given a new backlog item in the prioritization tool, when synchronization occurs, then the item is added to Jira automatically.
- Given a removal of a backlog item in Jira, when synchronization occurs, then the item is removed from the prioritization tool.
epic:
Epic : Priorisation intelligente connectée à Jira
Objectif : Permettre au Product Owner de synchroniser le backlog Jira, scorer automatiquement les items (RICE, WSJF, IA), puis renvoyer les résultats dans Jira.
